summary: Audit Interne & Non-conformites Module (ARS 1000) - Complete Testing. All 25 backend API tests PASSED. All frontend pages and interactions verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend audit_internal.py is well-structured with proper Pydantic models and MongoDB serialization
Checklist seeding from JSON file works correctly (38 ARS1000-1 + 14 ARS1000-2 = 52 items)
Conformite update with history tracking properly implemented
NC auto-numbering works correctly (nc_number increments per cooperative)
Dashboard aggregation pipeline correctly computes stats per norme and per section
PDF export uses reportlab with proper styling and table formatting
Excel export uses openpyxl with proper headers, formatting, and color-coded rows by conformite
Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
QuickActionsPanel correctly includes 'Audit & Conformite' section with 5 items
seed_data_creation: Created multiple audit sessions and NCs during testing. Integration test created session 'Integration Test Audit' with evaluated items.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit module fully tested. Multiple sessions exist in DB. Checklist items seeded from /app/backend/data_seed/ars1000_checklist_data.json. Rate limiter may block after 30 attempts - restart backend to clear.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/audit/sessions: PASSED - Creates session with 52 checklist items (38 ARS1000-1 + 14 ARS1000-2)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/audit/sessions/{id}/checklist: PASSED - Returns checklist with stats and filters (norme, niveau, cible, etape, conformite)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/audit/non-conformites: PASSED - Returns NCs with stats and filters (session_id, statut, type_nc)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/audit/dashboard: PASSED - Returns conformity dashboard with stats per norme and per section
backend_endpoints.GET /api/audit/sessions/{id}/resultats: PASSED - Returns results table like Excel sheet

frontend_pages./cooperative/audit: PASSED - Dashboard with KPIs, norme cards (ARS 1000-1/2), sections, quick actions, NC summary
frontend_pages./cooperative/audit/checklist: PASSED - Checklist with filters (norme, niveau, conformite, cible, etape), expandable items, inline editing
frontend_pages./cooperative/audit/non-conformites: PASSED - NC list with create/edit modals, filters (statut, type), KPIs
frontend_pages./cooperative/audit/reports: PASSED - Results table (like Excel), NC table, export buttons (PDF/Excel)
frontend_pages./cooperative/audit/revue: PASSED - Management review list with create modal

frontend_interactions.Dashboard navigation buttons: PASSED - Checklist, Non-conformites, Rapports, Revue direction all navigate correctly
frontend_interactions.Checklist filters: PASSED - Norme (ARS 1000-1/2), Niveau (Bronze/Argent/Or), Conformite (C/NC/NA) filters work
frontend_interactions.NC creation modal: PASSED - Opens, form fields work (clause, type, constatation, cause, corrections, actions, responsable, date)
frontend_interactions.NC edit modal: PASSED - Opens with existing data, can update status
frontend_interactions.Revue creation modal: PASSED - Opens, form fields work (date, participants, points, decisions, actions, prochaine)
frontend_interactions.QuickActionsPanel: PASSED - Contains 'Audit & Conformite' section with 5 items (Dashboard, Checklist, Non-conformites, Rapports, Revue direction)
